summary: Build a landing page for the Smart QR app, including product overview, feature highlights, a contact form, and an embedded Smart QR Login/Register app.
known_issues: Landing page generation/build request previously failed; user requested retry.

existing_features.title: Create a single-page Smart QR marketing landing page that includes: (1) a product overview section, (2) a feature highlights section, (3) a contact form, and (4) an embedded view of the existing Smart QR Login/Register app.
Implement the contact form UX (name, email, message) with client-side validation and submission state handling (loading, success, error).
Wire the contact form submission to the backend using the existing actor/React Query patterns in the template without modifying immutable hook files.
Apply a coherent visual theme to the landing page (colors, typography, spacing, and component styling) and use it consistently across all sections; avoid a blue/purple primary palette.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create Smart QR landing page with product overview, feature highlights, contact form, and embedded Smart QR Login/Register app
Add backend support to receive and persist contact form submissions in the single Motoko canister, and expose a query method to list submissions for basic verification/testing.
